span.p:
Executive sponsor
scope, focus, funding,
stop, repair, scale

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sales owner
fit validation, account insight,
activation, objections

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Marketing owner
MOIN, content, distribution,
asset quality

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RevOps owner
fields, signal log,
dashboard, cadence evidence

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Technical or SME owner
proof, application detail,
validation, feasibility

div.style: color: rgb(12, 74, 110) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
AI operator
draft, classify, critique,
assemble under review
